name: Blueberry Jam (Little)
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Frozen blueberries - partially thawed and sweetened with non-nutritive sweetener equivalent to 2 cups sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix lemon juice, gelatin, salt, and arrowroot in a bowl.
2. Stir in the frozen blueberries.
3. Bring the mixture to a gentle boil over medium heat, stirring constantly until it thickens (about 3-4 minutes).
4. Continue boiling at full boil for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the sweetener.
6. Fill sterilized jars and seal.
Food Exchanges per serving: 1 tablespoon = trace FRUIT; CAL: 6 PER SERVING
